## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `devflow ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include full error output if available.

## Environment

- **devflow version**: (`devflow --version`)
- **OS**: (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Docker version**: (`docker --version`)
- **Provider type**: (local, postgres_template, neon, dblab, xata, plugin)
- **Shell**: (bash, zsh, fish)

# Paste relevant sections of .devflow.yml (redact credentials)
